//model: model key below was saved by /model (Fable 5, 1M context, saved 2026-07-12). CAUTION: Fable 5 left subscription plans after 2026-07-12 — bills usage credits at $10/$50 per M tokens; switch back via /model (Opus 4.8) if credits not enabled. ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var (claude-opus-4-8) still set as fallback.
//effort: fast + deep by default: fastMode true (~2.5x faster output, higher per-token cost / faster quota burn) + effortLevel xhigh (deep reasoning). The two are independent — fastMode is speed/cost only, effortLevel is depth only. This trades quota burn for both speed and quality; flip /fast off per-task if you need to conserve quota.
